lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I want to create an account. Where do I click?
lines.trans: 我想创建一个账号。应该点哪里？

lines.speaker: System
lines.line: Welcome. Please click "Sign Up" at the top right corner.
lines.trans: 欢迎。请点击右上角的"注册"。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Okay, I clicked it. Now it asks for my email and password.
lines.trans: 好的，我点了。现在让我输入邮箱和密码。

lines.speaker: System
lines.line: Please enter a valid email address. Your password must be at least eight characters with one number.
lines.trans: 请输入有效的邮箱地址。密码至少八位，并包含一个数字。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I entered my email. Is "Sunshine123" okay for the password?
lines.trans: 我输入了邮箱。密码用"Sunshine123"可以吗？

lines.speaker: System
lines.line: That password is acceptable. Please confirm it by typing it again.
lines.trans: 该密码可用。请再次输入以确认。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Done. Now it says I need to verify my email. I will check my inbox.
lines.trans: 好了。现在提示我需要验证邮箱。我去看看收件箱。

lines.speaker: System
lines.line: A verification code has been sent. Please enter the code within ten minutes.
lines.trans: 验证码已发送。请在十分钟内输入。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I got the code. It is 482916. I entered it.
lines.trans: 我收到验证码了。是482916。我输入了。

lines.speaker: System
lines.line: Verification successful. Your account is ready. Welcome aboard!
lines.trans: 验证成功。您的账号已创建。欢迎加入！
